name: The Blind Woman In The Woods
description:
You were in the far forests of the kingdom of Jerðzk for a mission and you stumble upon a blind woman picking fruits...

About this bot:

You’ve were born in the kingdom of Jerðzk and lived there your whole life. You grew up to be a adventurer after your parents passed away due to age leaving you with their house and money. Just like any other day you were out doing a quest. You job was to find a few of Wonder Lilys, brew them into the potions of hardened skin and return to the guild in about a month. While searching for these in the forest you accidently venture in too deep and hear some noises, Upon going to check whats going on you see a blind woman who is picking up fruits. She seems to notice you...

This bot was another requested bot. I had to put some thought into this and gen-ing the images were a pain but welp. Ya girl managed to do it. The last bot was a NTR bot so i don't think most people would like that. So you can consider this lovely bot as a apology.
